description: B4 / FGAP-043 — cross-block join tool (HYBRID edge + field). Library joinBlocks(cwd, spec): JoinResult[] in project-sdk.ts where spec={leftBlock,rightBlock,relationType?|leftField?+rightField?,leftEndpoint?,leftPredicate?} and JoinResult={left:ItemRecord, right:ItemRecord[]} (right always array; one-to-many natural). Edge mode: filter left + loadRelations(relationType) + match by leftEndpoint(parent|child) + resolve other endpoint via buildIdIndex scoped to rightBlock (handles wildcard target). Field mode: index rightBlock by rightField, each left → matches by left[leftField]. Mode = exactly-one-of relationType XOR leftField+rightField (else throw). Dual-surface (DEC-0019/0020): library + Pi tool join-blocks (truncateHead; where{Field,Op,Value} left predicate) + CLI scripts/orchestrator/join-blocks.ts + tests. Closes Cluster B. Plan: ~/.claude/plans ACTIVE.
acceptance_criteria: joinBlocks edge mode: leftEndpoint parent vs child return correct opposite sides; one-to-many → right[]; rightBlock scoping excludes endpoints in other blocks (wildcard relation); unknown relationType → right:[] (permissive); leftPredicate filters left
joinBlocks field mode: left[leftField]===right[rightField] pairing; one-to-many → right[]; no match → right:[]; missing field → right:[]
mode validation: both modes or neither → throw; leftField without rightField → throw; missing block → throw; right ALWAYS an array
Pi tool join-blocks (mode-validated, truncateHead) + CLI join-blocks.ts (--relation-type | --left-field/--right-field, --left-endpoint, --where, exit 0/2/3)

build/check/test green; runtime demo on real .project (edge: verification_verifies_item VER-027↔TASK-055; field: tasks.verification===verification.id where completed); fresh-context adversarial; skills regen surfaces join-blocks
notes: Foreground Write agent for source per feedback_no_adhoc_dev; orchestrator runs npm/tsx/git. Closes FGAP-043 → Cluster B (read/query) COMPLETE. Hybrid per user (edge DEC-0013-native + field legacy/general).
